hell_major_001.title: Portal to Earth
hell_major_001.body: A massive portal to Earth is ready. Your ministers want to open it immediately to show the power of Hell. Do you let them do it?
hell_major_001.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_001.outcome_yes_body: The portal spirals out of control. Hell loses control. Game over.
hell_major_001.outcome_no_body: You stop this madness. Your influence on Earth returns to a stable level.

hell_major_002.title: Assault Too Early
hell_major_002.body: Your legions want to attack before they are ready. They say waiting would be an admission of weakness. Do you give the order?
hell_major_002.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_002.outcome_yes_body: You launch the assault too early. The legions are cut in half. For 12 cards, the card message appears without vowels.
hell_major_002.outcome_no_body: You impose real preparation. The legions return to 50. For 12 cards, the card message appears without vowels.

hell_major_003.title: Major Cleanup in the Administration
hell_major_003.body: No one understands who is in charge of what in Hell anymore. Do you shut down the entire administration to restore order?
hell_major_003.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_003.outcome_yes_body: You restore simple rules. Order in Hell returns to 50. For 12 cards, the choices appear without vowels.
hell_major_003.outcome_no_body: The chaos continues. Order in Hell is cut in half. For 12 cards, the choices appear without vowels.

hell_major_004.title: Sorting the Souls
hell_major_004.body: Thousands of souls have been placed in the wrong zone. Do you stop everything to sort them again?
hell_major_004.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_004.outcome_yes_body: You avoid an even bigger disaster. Damned souls return to 50. For 12 cards, the card message appears reversed.
hell_major_004.outcome_no_body: You let the situation rot. The available souls drop by half. For 12 cards, the card message appears reversed.

hell_major_005.title: Terror Operation
hell_major_005.body: A general wants to terrorize humans on a massive scale to speed up pacts. Do you authorize him?
hell_major_005.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_005.outcome_yes_body: The operation becomes uncontrollable. Your influence on Earth is cut in half. For 12 cards, the choices appear reversed.
hell_major_005.outcome_no_body: You refuse the escalation. Your influence on Earth returns to 50. For 12 cards, the choices appear reversed.

hell_major_006.title: Court of Sycophants
hell_major_006.body: Around you, everyone says yes before they even understand what is happening. Do you dismiss half your court to get useful people back?
hell_major_006.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_006.outcome_yes_body: You hit too broadly and order in Hell collapses by half.
hell_major_006.outcome_no_body: You take back control of the court without breaking everything. Order in Hell returns to 50.

hell_major_007.title: Exhausted Legions
hell_major_007.body: Your troops cannot take it anymore, but their leaders want to keep going to save face. Do you impose real rest?
hell_major_007.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_007.outcome_yes_body: You prevent a collapse. The legions return to 50.
hell_major_007.outcome_no_body: Your armies break completely. Game over.

hell_major_008.title: New Damnation System
hell_major_008.body: A demon promises faster soul processing with a brutal and unstable method. Do you approve it?
hell_major_008.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_008.outcome_yes_body: The system destroys more than it brings in. Damned souls drop by half.
hell_major_008.outcome_no_body: You refuse this shortcut. Damned souls return to 50.

hell_major_009.title: Punish a Great Demon
hell_major_009.body: A high-ranking official has stolen resources and everyone knows it. Do you bring him down publicly?
hell_major_009.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_009.outcome_yes_body: You remind everyone that no one is above the throne. Order in Hell returns to 50.
hell_major_009.outcome_no_body: The others understand they can do the same. The legions lose half their cohesion.

hell_major_010.title: Demonstration Raid
hell_major_010.body: Your commanders want to carry out a small attack on Earth just to send a message. Do you let them go?
hell_major_010.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_010.outcome_yes_body: The message backfires on you. Your influence on Earth is cut in half.
hell_major_010.outcome_no_body: You refuse to improvise. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.

hell_major_011.title: Black Market for Souls
hell_major_011.body: Demons are reselling souls outside the official system. Do you launch a real purge?
hell_major_011.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_011.outcome_yes_body: You clean up the system. Damned souls return to 50.
hell_major_011.outcome_no_body: Trafficking becomes normal. Order in Hell loses half its strength.

hell_major_012.title: Military Parade
hell_major_012.body: Your generals want a grand display of power. You know they mostly want to inflate their egos. Do you agree?
hell_major_012.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_012.outcome_yes_body: The parade turns ridiculous. The legions lose half their value.
hell_major_012.outcome_no_body: You shut down the spectacle. The legions return to 50.

hell_major_013.title: Infiltration Mission
hell_major_013.body: A group of demons wants to secretly infiltrate the human world. The plan is risky but possible. Do you send the team?
hell_major_013.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_013.outcome_yes_body: The operation stays limited and clean. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.
hell_major_013.outcome_no_body: You let an opportunity slip away and the door closes. Your influence on Earth drops by half.

hell_major_014.title: Panicked Scribes
hell_major_014.body: The scribes say the decrees have been contradicting each other for months. Do you impose one clear rule for everyone?
hell_major_014.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_014.outcome_yes_body: You impose a single rule too brutally. Order in Hell is cut in half.
hell_major_014.outcome_no_body: You restore order without freezing the whole system. Order in Hell returns to 50.

hell_major_015.title: Troop Rationing
hell_major_015.body: You can ration the legions harshly to rebuild the soul reserves, or maintain their standard of living. Do you ration them?
hell_major_015.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_015.outcome_yes_body: You avoid general unrest. The legions return to a stable level.
hell_major_015.outcome_no_body: The soul reserves melt away. Their gauge is cut in half.

hell_major_016.title: Forbidden Gate
hell_major_016.body: An old sealed gate leads to an ancient passage into the world of humans. No one really knows what lies behind it. Do you open it?
hell_major_016.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_016.outcome_yes_body: You awaken something you cannot control. Game over.
hell_major_016.outcome_no_body: You leave that danger sealed. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.

hell_major_017.title: Public Humiliation
hell_major_017.body: Two important demons are openly mocking your authority. Do you crush them in front of everyone?
hell_major_017.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_017.outcome_yes_body: You remind everyone that the throne is not decorative. Order in Hell returns to 50.
hell_major_017.outcome_no_body: The rest of the court takes note. Order in Hell drops by half.

hell_major_018.title: Pact Factory
hell_major_018.body: You are offered a way to turn pacts into an automatic process to move faster. Do you start the machine?
hell_major_018.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_018.outcome_yes_body: The system grinds up souls instead of collecting them. Damned souls fall by half.
hell_major_018.outcome_no_body: You refuse automation. Damned souls return to 50.

hell_major_019.title: War Bonus
hell_major_019.body: Your legions demand an immediate bonus before the next campaign. Do you pay to calm everyone down?
hell_major_019.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_019.outcome_yes_body: You shut down the mutiny before it starts. The legions return to 50.
hell_major_019.outcome_no_body: The soldiers help themselves. The legions are cut in half.

hell_major_020.title: Visibility on Earth
hell_major_020.body: Some demons want to show themselves publicly to humans in order to spread fear faster. Do you authorize this display?
hell_major_020.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_020.outcome_yes_body: Everyone sees far too clearly what is happening. Your influence on Earth collapses by half.
hell_major_020.outcome_no_body: You stay discreet and effective. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.

hell_major_021.title: Brutal Reform
hell_major_021.body: You can fire all the useless leaders in Hell at once, or move more slowly. Do you strike right away?
hell_major_021.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_021.outcome_yes_body: You finally make room for competent people. Order in Hell returns to 50.
hell_major_021.outcome_no_body: The incompetent ones keep control. Order in Hell is cut in half.

hell_major_022.title: Reserve Inventory
hell_major_022.body: The numbers for the soul reserves no longer match at all. Do you freeze all distribution to count everything again?
hell_major_022.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_022.outcome_yes_body: You save what matters most. Damned souls return to 50.
hell_major_022.outcome_no_body: The losses continue. Damned souls lose half their value.

hell_major_023.title: Impossible Offensive
hell_major_023.body: A general claims he can win with half the troops. Do you believe him?
hell_major_023.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_023.outcome_yes_body: He fails and drags your soldiers down with him. The legions are cut in half.
hell_major_023.outcome_no_body: You refuse the stupid gamble. The legions return to 50.

hell_major_024.title: Message to Humans
hell_major_024.body: An advisor wants to send a huge sign to humans to leave a lasting impression. Do you approve this staging?
hell_major_024.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_024.outcome_yes_body: You frame the operation and keep control. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.
hell_major_024.outcome_no_body: You let the fear fade away. Your influence on Earth drops by half.

hell_major_025.title: Single Rule
hell_major_025.body: You can impose a very clear chain of command, or keep handling conflicts case by case. Do you impose the rule?
hell_major_025.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_025.outcome_yes_body: Responsibilities finally become clear. Order in Hell returns to 50.
hell_major_025.outcome_no_body: The infighting consumes the whole system. Order in Hell loses half its strength.

hell_major_026.title: Soul Exploitation
hell_major_026.body: A minister wants to squeeze even more out of souls that are already exhausted. It is profitable in the short term. Do you authorize it?
hell_major_026.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_026.outcome_yes_body: You push too hard. Damned souls collapse by half.
hell_major_026.outcome_no_body: You prevent the abuse. Damned souls return to 50.

hell_major_027.title: Patrol Recall
hell_major_027.body: Your patrols want to stay out despite their losses. Do you force them to come back?
hell_major_027.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_027.outcome_yes_body: You save what is left of the army. The legions return to 50.
hell_major_027.outcome_no_body: You let the bleeding continue. The legions drop by half.

hell_major_028.title: Sectarianism Among Humans
hell_major_028.body: Your agents on Earth want to push humans to tear each other apart even more. Do you give them the green light?
hell_major_028.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_028.outcome_yes_body: Everything becomes too visible. Your influence on Earth loses half its value.
hell_major_028.outcome_no_body: You keep a colder strategy. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.

hell_major_029.title: Chain of Sanctions
hell_major_029.body: You can punish all the leaders who let Hell drift out of control, or keep delaying. Do you strike?
hell_major_029.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_029.outcome_yes_body: You restore useful fear. Order in Hell returns to 50.
hell_major_029.outcome_no_body: Your hesitation costs you dearly. Order in Hell is cut in half.

hell_major_030.title: Strategic Reserve
hell_major_030.body: You can keep some souls for the future, or use everything now. Do you keep a reserve?
hell_major_030.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_030.outcome_yes_body: You secure the long term. Damned souls return to 50.
hell_major_030.outcome_no_body: You burn through everything too fast. Damned souls drop by half.

hell_major_031.title: Suicidal March
hell_major_031.body: A commander swears that a frontal attack is enough to turn the situation around. Do you follow him all the way?
hell_major_031.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_031.outcome_yes_body: You send everyone to slaughter. Game over.
hell_major_031.outcome_no_body: You refuse the madness. The legions return to 50.

hell_major_032.title: Low Profile
hell_major_032.body: You can reduce visible demonic appearances among humans to regain control. Do you choose discretion?
hell_major_032.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_032.outcome_yes_body: You become less visible and more effective. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.
hell_major_032.outcome_no_body: You keep showing too much. Your influence on Earth drops by half.

hell_major_033.title: Contradictory Decrees
hell_major_033.body: Three sets of rules cancel each other out. Do you scrap everything and start over from scratch?
hell_major_033.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_033.outcome_yes_body: You start over too brutally. Order in Hell is cut in half.
hell_major_033.outcome_no_body: You rebuild without destroying everything at once. Order in Hell returns to 50.

hell_major_034.title: Forgotten Souls
hell_major_034.body: An entire zone contains souls that have been forgotten for years. Do you reopen it to recover them?
hell_major_034.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_034.outcome_yes_body: You recover a valuable stockpile. Damned souls return to 50.
hell_major_034.outcome_no_body: You abandon a vital resource. Damned souls are cut in half.

hell_major_035.title: Troop Reorganization
hell_major_035.body: You can break up several worn-out units to rebuild a healthy army, or keep the current structure. Do you break them up?
hell_major_035.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_035.outcome_yes_body: You start again on a stronger foundation. The legions return to 50.
hell_major_035.outcome_no_body: You keep units that are already broken. The legions drop by half.

hell_major_036.title: Direct Intervention on Earth
hell_major_036.body: You can intervene personally in the world of humans to speed things up. It is powerful, but very dangerous. Do you go?
hell_major_036.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_036.outcome_yes_body: You expose yourself too much. Your influence on Earth collapses by half.
hell_major_036.outcome_no_body: You keep your distance and your room to maneuver. Your influence on Earth returns to 50.

hell_major_037.title: Crisis Committee
hell_major_037.body: You can create a real crisis committee with clear powers, or keep handling everything alone in emergency mode. Do you delegate?
hell_major_037.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_037.outcome_yes_body: You finally structure the response. Order in Hell returns to 50.
hell_major_037.outcome_no_body: You wear yourself out, and the system with you. Order in Hell drops by half.

hell_major_038.title: Pacts Too Easy
hell_major_038.body: Pacts have become so easy that they are losing their value. Do you make them rarer and stricter?
hell_major_038.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_038.outcome_yes_body: You restore value to every soul. Damned souls return to 50.
hell_major_038.outcome_no_body: You let the market empty out. Damned souls lose half their value.

hell_major_039.title: Rotation of Military Leaders
hell_major_039.body: The same leaders have stayed in place too long and protect their own interests. Do you replace them?
hell_major_039.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_039.outcome_yes_body: You replace everyone too quickly. The legions are cut in half.
hell_major_039.outcome_no_body: You prepare the transition without breaking the army. The legions return to 50.

hell_major_040.title: Last Seal
hell_major_040.body: An ancient seal protects the heart of Hell. Some say that breaking it would give you enormous power. Do you break it?
hell_major_040.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
hell_major_040.outcome_yes_body: You destroy the very balance of the kingdom. Game over.
hell_major_040.outcome_no_body: You resist the temptation. Order in Hell returns to 50.
